attempt_strategy.round_1: Rapid Fire (0-25 mins): Pick up 1-mark 'Speed' topics like Simplification, Number Series, Syllogism, and Cloze Test. Skip any question that requires more than 30 seconds to read.
attempt_strategy.round_2: Steady Grind (25-50 mins): Focus on Arithmetic word problems, easy-to-moderate Data Interpretation, and single-paragraph Puzzles. Maintain accuracy to avoid -0.25 penalties.
attempt_strategy.round_3: The Filter (50-60 mins): Only attempt the remaining questions if you can eliminate at least two options. Avoid blind guessing as negative marking is the focus here.

questions.question:
What should come in place of the question mark (?) in the following expression?
45% of 160 + √1225 - 12% of 250 = ?² - 5

Statements: No laptop is a tablet. Some tablets are mobiles. All mobiles are chargers.
Conclusions:
I. Some chargers are tablets.
II. No laptop is a charger.
options: C) Either I or II follows
D) Neither I nor II follows
questions.explanation: Since some tablets are mobiles and all mobiles are chargers, those mobiles which are tablets are also chargers. So I follows. II is a 'No' relation which isn't definitely true as chargers can overlap with laptops.

questions.question: Choose the most appropriate word to fill in the blank: The recent ______ in the global market has led several tech giants to freeze hiring processes for the upcoming quarter.
questions.explanation: 'Downturn' fits the negative context of 'freeze hiring'. Options A, C, and D denote positive or neutral states.

questions.question: A vessel contains 80 liters of a mixture of milk and water in the ratio 7:3. How much water should be added to make the ratio 1:1?
questions.explanation: Initially: Milk = 56L, Water = 24L. For 1:1 ratio, Milk must equal Water. Water needed = 56 - 24 = 32L.

questions.question:
In the following question, four words are given of which two are most nearly the same or opposite in meaning. Find the pair.
(A) Abundance (B) Scarcity (C) Wealth (D) Prosperity
If 'A + B' means A is father of B, 'A - B' means A is sister of B, 'A * B' means A is wife of B. Which of the following shows P is paternal aunt of Q?
questions.explanation: P - R (P is sister of R), R + Q (R is father of Q). Father's sister is paternal aunt.

questions.question: How many such pairs of letters are there in the word 'SBI-CLERK' which have as many letters between them in the word as in the English alphabet (both forward and backward)?
questions.explanation: Pairs: (C-E) -> C, D, E; (E-L) is not. Checking: (I-L) -> I, J, K, L. (C-E) is one. (I-L) is two. Note: hyphen is ignored in standard exam word-pair questions.

questions.question: Read the sentence to find out if there is any grammatical error: Every one of the students (A) / who were present (B) / in the classroom (C) / have failed the test (D).
questions.explanation: The subject 'Every one' is singular, so it should be 'has failed' instead of 'have failed'.

questions.question: The speed of a boat in still water is 15 km/h and the speed of the current is 3 km/h. Find the distance traveled downstream in 12 minutes.
questions.explanation: Downstream speed = 15 + 3 = 18 km/h. Time = 12/60 = 1/5 hours. Distance = 18 * (1/5) = 3.6 km.

questions.question:
Statements: A > B ≤ C; D = B ≥ E. 
Conclusion I: A > E 
Conclusion II: C ≥ E
options: C) Both I and II follow
D) Neither I nor II follows
questions.explanation: From the statements: A > B and B ≥ E, so A > E (I follows). Also C ≥ B and B ≥ E, so C ≥ E (II follows).

questions.question: Rearrange the following parts to form a coherent sentence: (P) the impact of (Q) the study explores (R) social media on (S) mental health.
questions.explanation: Q (The study explores) P (the impact of) R (social media on) S (mental health).
